use_cases: Display user avatars with online/offline status indicators in dashboards and team views
Show user profile pictures with presence indicators in messaging and collaboration apps
Render user avatars in social media feeds and comment sections
Display team member avatars with status badges in admin panels
Show user profiles in e-commerce seller/reviewer sections
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system featuring Radix UI primitives with multiple sub-components including Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus. Supports four status variants (online, offline, busy, away) with CVA-powered styling. Designed for displaying user profiles with real-time presence indicators in dashboards, social platforms, and collaboration tools. Clean, minimal aesthetic suitable for professional SaaS applications.
